title: Sano Blue Water Toilet Bowl Cleaner Long Lasting Air Freshener WC Tablet Pack of 4
features: ALL IN ONE - multifunctional portable toilet bowl cleaner, disinfectant, deodoriser, fresher, urine stains and odor remover, prevents limescale build up and leaves the water in a blue colour of cleanliness

USE - suitable for every water toilet cistern with a removable top cover in your house, office, caravan, motorhome, camper, yacht or boat; wait for the tank to fill up with water, insert the block upright inside the cistern, place it carefully at the bottom in a vertical position in some of the corners, make sure the air from the cassette is completely gone, will become active in about hour or two
LONG LASTING automatic perfumed toilet chemical cleaner, coloring water in blue for up to 900 flushes, strong and powerful bad smell eliminator, spreads a fresh fragrance after every flush
ANTIBACTERIAL and antimicrobial cleaner and sanitiser, kill 99,9% of germs, keeps the flushing tank and toilet bowl clean eliminating various health hazards
CLEANING - urine stains removal, odour neutraliser, forms a protective layer against dirt and scale build up, keeps your wc nice and clean
description: Sano is a detergent product manufacturer in Israel founded in 1961 by Bruno Landesberg. It provides professional cleaning solutions for the household, as well as for the industrial and institutional sectors. The company produces home care cleaning and hygiene products and accessories, disposable diapers, incontinence products for adults, laundry detergents, air freshners, pesticides and insect repellents, cosmetics, paper products and more.
